title: Cannot delete triple with non-ASCII characters in literal with language tag
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE graph1 (s String, p String, o String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY s;
DELETE FROM graph1 WHERE s = 'http://test/2' AND p = 'http://test/name' AND o = 'ø';
key_bug_features: Deleting triples with non-ASCII characters fails
